top_5_fixes: v6 resolves most prior non-blocking improvements (score precision policy, scorecard evidence cross-reference, KPI uncertainty bands, and gate-level rollback actions); retain this structure as a release baseline.
Add third-party validation source tags to competitor proof entries where available (e.g., analyst, audit, customer attestation IDs) to close the remaining v5 recommendation.
Promote status-mapping and rounding rules from assumptions into a dedicated evaluator/validator config artifact to ensure single-source reproducibility across versions.
Standardize competitor proof strings into a strict parseable key set (period, sample_n, baseline, current, delta, source_tag) for diligence automation.
Maintain explicit EvidenceID-to-artifact URI mapping outside candidate JSON (data room index) so investors can trace each readiness dimension to immutable evidence.
